title: Add navigation links for Dashboard and Social Media sections

requirements.summary: Add Dashboard and Social Media navigation menu items to Header component
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard link appears in the navigation menu
Social Media link appears in the navigation menu
Both links are visible in desktop navigation
Both links are visible in mobile hamburger menu
Navigation maintains the existing earth-tone styling

file_operations.description: Add Dashboard and Social Media navigation links to both desktop nav menu and mobile Sheet menu, positioned after existing Customers, Calendar, and Jobs links. Maintain consistent styling with existing earth-tone theme and navigation patterns.

requirements.summary: Create Dashboard page with revenue insights showing monthly totals, jobs completed, and average job value
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page displays total revenue for the current month
Dashboard shows count of jobs completed
Dashboard calculates and displays average job value
Dashboard is accessible via the Dashboard navigation link

file_operations.description: Create Dashboard page component that fetches all jobs using useGetAllJobs hook, calculates monthly revenue metrics (total revenue, completed jobs count, average job value) for the current month, and displays them in card-based layout with earth-tone styling. Use placeholder revenue values derived from job count and sample calculations since backend does not store revenue data.

requirements.summary: Create Social Media page with AI post generator, content calendar, template library, and post preview functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Social Media page is accessible via the Social Media navigation link
Page includes section for AI-powered post generation with topic, tone, and platform selection
Page includes content calendar view for planning posts
Page includes template library with categories: before/after, prevention tips, testimonials, emergency response, seasonal content
Page includes post preview and editing interface with copy to clipboard functionality

file_operations.description: Create Social Media page component with tabbed interface (Tabs component from shadcn/ui) containing four sections: AI Post Generator (form with topic input, tone selector, platform selector, and generate button), Content Calendar (monthly calendar grid for planning posts), Template Library (categorized cards for before/after, prevention tips, testimonials, emergency response, seasonal content), and Post Preview (textarea for editing with copy to clipboard button). Use earth-tone styling and reference the social media illustration asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/social-media-illustration.dim_400x300.png in the page header or empty states. Note: This is a frontend-only implementation with mock data and no actual AI integration.

Create AI post generator component with form inputs for topic (text input), tone (select: Professional, Friendly, Urgent, Educational), and platform (select: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter). Include generate button that creates mock AI-generated content based on selections. Display generated content in a Card component with earth-tone styling.

Create content calendar component showing a monthly grid view for planning social media posts. Use similar calendar structure as MonthlyCalendar component but adapted for content planning. Display placeholder posts and allow users to see scheduled content dates. Maintain earth-tone styling consistent with application theme.

Create template library component displaying categorized template cards for: before/after transformations, prevention tips, testimonials, emergency response, and seasonal content. Each category shows sample templates with preview text. Use Card components in a responsive grid layout with earth-tone styling. Include click handlers to load templates into the post preview.

Create post preview component with editable textarea for post content and a copy to clipboard button. Include preview of how the post will appear on different platforms. Use Textarea and Button components from shadcn/ui with earth-tone styling. Implement clipboard copy functionality with toast notification on success.

requirements.summary: Configure routing for Dashboard and Social Media pages with authentication protection
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard route is registered and accessible
Social Media route is registered and accessible
Routes are protected by authentication like existing routes
Navigation links correctly route to new pages

file_operations.description: Register Dashboard route at /dashboard and Social Media route at /social-media within the authenticated Route group. Import DashboardPage and SocialMediaPage components and add them as child routes with appropriate path configurations, ensuring they are protected by the same authentication guard as existing Customers, Calendar, and Jobs routes.
